entities.name: UglifyJS

entities.name: undefined
entities.context: A primitive value in JavaScript representing the absence of a value.

entities.name: NaN
entities.context: A special value in JavaScript representing 'Not a Number'.

entities.name: Infinity
entities.context: A special value in JavaScript representing positive infinity.

entities.name: Object
entities.context: A fundamental building block in JavaScript for creating objects.

entities.name: Array
entities.context: A built-in object used for creating array-like collections in JavaScript.

entities.name: Function

entities.name: Error

relationships.context: UglifyJS modifies JavaScript code for optimization.
undefined is a primitive value in JavaScript.
NaN is a special numeric value in JavaScript.
Infinity is a special numeric value in JavaScript.
Object is a fundamental part of JavaScript.
Array is a data structure in JavaScript.
Function is a key concept for defining behavior in JavaScript.
Error is used for handling exceptions in JavaScript.
